title: Evergreen India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Evergreen India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Warehouse Manager in Jodhpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!
